title: Rich Spanish Serrano Ham Flatbread
description: A floral and fluffy midnight craving Spanish dish featuring serrano ham and pickle, made with mediterranean friendly ingredients and cooked on a tava griddle.
instructions: Preheat the tava griddle to medium high heat.
Roll out the flatbread to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Brush the flatbread with olive oil and sprinkle with minced garlic.
Top the flatbread with serrano ham, pickle, rosemary, and feta cheese.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cook the flatbread on the tava griddle for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the flatbread from the griddle and let it cool for a minute or two.
Slice the flatbread into wedges and serve immediately.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
